hero.description: Senior Computer Engineer focused on technical leadership, enterprise systems architecture, and IT governance. Guided by the goal of supporting development teams at the Controladoria Geral do Estado de Mato Grosso, ensuring scalable, secure, and efficient deliveries.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I am a Senior Computer Engineer focused on the development and technical supervision of highly complex enterprise systems. Currently, I serve as a Tech Lead and Technical Supervisor at the Controladoria Geral do Estado de Mato Grosso (CGE-MT), where I am responsible for team support, architectural standards compliance, and quality of delivery. My background in Computer Engineering and Cybersecurity, combined with expertise in software architecture and network infrastructure, allows me to drive projects focused on technological governance, compliance, and information security.
about.devDesc: Responsible for the agricultural and livestock modules of the Agrix software. Development based on complex business rules for agricultural management.
about.netDesc: Management and maintenance of network infrastructure, ensuring stability and security.
about.eduDesc: Graduated with a focus on information security.
about.tccName: "Executable Analysis for Beginners: An Introduction to Reverse Engineering"
about.tccDesc: An in-depth study on reverse engineering techniques aimed at educational and security purposes.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.agrixDesc: Agricultural management software. I act as responsible for agricultural and livestock modules, implementing critical business rules for the sector.
projects.debtDesc: Debt control and management system developed in partnership with RomeraSCR. Allows account management and installment control.

cge.company: Controladoria Geral do Estado de Mato Grosso
cge.description: Responsible for technical oversight and supervision of the government systems development team. Acting in technical leadership, definition of software architecture standards, code quality auditing, and alignment of agile processes for the Controladoria Geral do Estado de Mato Grosso.

lbrit.description: Experience developing high-complexity software for the agricultural management sector (Agrix software). Responsible for leading the implementation of critical business rules in agricultural and livestock modules, focusing on database performance and enterprise scalability.

teleturbo.description: Network analyst focused on FTTH documentation and ONT management. Intense activity with technical support involving router port configuration, NAT, and troubleshooting connectivity issues.

simulations.title: Simulation Network
simulations.subtitle: Precision tools for your financial decisions.

footer.title: Let's Talk?
footer.description: I am always open to new opportunities and partnerships. If you have a project in mind or just want to chat, get in touch!
